subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Thee, O my God! All praise be to Thee for having enabled me to recognize the Manifestation of Thy Self and the Dayspring of Thy Cause [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی لک الحمد بما ایدتنی علی عرفان مظهر نفسک و مطلع امرک و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @evanescence and eternality; fana and baqa, @power of prayer, @prayer for spiritual recognition
